relationships: kab:Ur yessefk ara ad yettwaxdem kra deg way-agi﹖
kab:Ur yuklal ara ad s-tt-iẓer yiwen deg kra
kab:Yenna-d Tom belli ur yezmir ara ad isel ula i kra
kab:Bɣiɣ ad yili kra n yiwen i wumi ara meslayeɣ
kab:Ilaq ad tedduḍ yid-i kra n wass
kab:Yella kra ur neddi ara akken ilaq﹖
kab:S kra n win i t-yessnen akken ilaq yettqadar-it
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
